SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made on the 1st day of January, 2024.

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. John Tan, NRIC No. S1234567A, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, contact number +65 9123 4567, email johntan@example.sg.

2. Ms. Emily Chen, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 456 Raffles Avenue, #56-78, Singapore 234567, contact number +65 9876 5432, email emilychen@example.sg.

AND

3. Bright Ventures Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN 200912345A, having its registered office at 789 Marina Boulevard, #10-11, Singapore 345678, contact number +65 6789 0123, email info@brightventures.sg.

Recitals and Terms:

The parties wish to enter into this Agreement to regulate their respective rights and obligations as shareholders of Bright Ventures Pte. Ltd. and to set forth their mutual understanding regarding the governance of the company.

The initial share capital contribution shall be SGD 250,000 (Singapore Dollars Two Hundred Fifty Thousand Only) distributed as agreed herein.
